sigma_rules.title: CDB Sentinel APEX - CVE202659206_n8n_is_an_open_source_workflow_automation_platf
sigma_rules.description: Detects activity related to CVE-2026-59206: n8n is an open source workflow automation platform. Prior to 1.123.61, 2.27.4, and,
sigma_rules.author: CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0

yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Browser_Security_ZeroDays_Are_Only_Part_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Browser Security: Zero-Days Are Only Part of the Problem"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-07-11"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE202659206_n8n_is_an_open_source_workf {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-59206: n8n is an open source workflow automation platform. Prior to 1.1"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-07-11"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-59206" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-59206: n8n is an open source workflow automation pl"; content:"CVE-2026-59206"; nocase; sid:5096870; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
